divisions.title: David Crowned
divisions.summary: David laments Saul, reigns in Hebron, then takes Jerusalem as his city.

divisions.title: The Ark & the Covenant
divisions.summary: The ark comes home dancing; God promises David an everlasting dynasty.

divisions.title: David’s Victories
divisions.summary: Wars won on every side; kindness shown to Mephibosheth.

divisions.title: David & Bathsheba
divisions.summary: Adultery, murder, and Nathan’s parable: "You are the man."

divisions.title: Absalom’s Rebellion
divisions.summary: Amnon, Tamar, and Absalom — David’s own son drives him from Jerusalem.

divisions.title: David’s Final Years
divisions.summary: Rebellion, famine, songs of deliverance, and the census that cost a plague.
